zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Blount於大約1482年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾金萊特時，她的父親Thomas Blount38歲，母親Anne Croft25歲。她於1504年與Thomas Scriven在英國英格蘭史洛普爾金萊特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1519年之前在英國英格蘭史洛普爾福洛德斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Blount于大约1482年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾金萊特时，她的父亲Thomas Blount38岁，母亲Anne Croft25岁。她于1504年与Thomas Scriven在英国英格兰史洛普爾金萊特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1519年之前在英国英格兰史洛普爾福洛德斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Blount was born about 1482, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Blount, was 38 and her mother, Anne Croft, was 25. She married Thomas Scriven in 1504, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died before 1519, in Frodesley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Blount est née environ 1482, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Blount, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Anne Croft, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Scriven en 1504, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1519, à Frodesley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Blount um 1482 in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Blount 38 und ihre Mutter Anne Croft 25. Sie hat 1504 in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Scriven geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1519 in Frodesley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Blount è nata il circa 1482 nel Kinlet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Blount, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Anne Croft, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Scriven nel 1504, nel Kinlet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1519, nel Frodesley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Blountが約1482年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットで生まれた時，父Thomas Blountは38歳，母Anne Croftは25歳であった。1504年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットでThomas Scrivenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1519年以前にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアフロデスリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Blount(이)가 대략 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Blount(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Croft(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 Thomas Scriven(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 프로데슬리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Blount nasceu aproximadamente 1482, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Blount, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Anne Croft, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Scriven em 1504, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1519, em Frodesley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Blount родилась около 1482 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Blount было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Croft, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Scriven в 1504 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1519 г. в местности фродесли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Thomas Scriven en 1504, en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió antes de 1519, en Frodesley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
